content.en:
"Maybe this calamity itself is a chance!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

If his guess was correct, the Tribulation of this Land of Inheritance was itself a test, and as for the Extinction Realm Lord being able to enter the Land of Inheritance through the safest passage, it was undoubtedly too lucky, and this kind of luck was almost impossible to replicate.

The true way to pass through is to comprehend the calamity here and create a multi-dimensional mastery, so as to enter the true inheritance land through the passage here.

So, Ye Tian tried to create a multi-dimensional mastery here by comprehending the calamity.

This process is bound to be extremely difficult and can even take countless hours.

In order to save time, he plans to use the replica body to experience the power of the Wind Raid again and again, and even try to accommodate the Wind Raid into his body.

Although this will make the replica body fall, at least there will be a big gain, which is many times better than silent meditation.

In this way, Ye Tian's replica body kept trying, sacrificing a replica body, which also made him more and more aware of the tribulation, and his ~ understanding of the tribulation was also getting deeper and deeper.

Ten extradimensional eras!

One Hundred Extradimensional Eras!

Five hundred extradimensional eras!

As soon as Ye Tian came to his senses here, a full one to a thousand extradimensional epochs had passed.

During this period, his cultivation has improved slightly, the realm of extra-dimensional rules has also improved a little, the body of the black mother has also successfully broken through to the second layer of the Dacheng realm, and the three black secret methods have been raised to the second layer of the Dacheng-limit.

The overall strength is much stronger than in the past, but if such strength wants to break through the fifth level of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, it is undoubtedly not enough, unless his black mother body can break through again and reach the realm of the third layer of the first entry, he can let him pass the fifth level.

Or let him cultivate into the third innate multi-dimensional Dao body, and perfectly control the three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies.

At this time.

Ye Tian was already about to create a multi-dimensional mastery that could use the Tribulation Wind, and once he created it, he could pass through the Tribulation Wind and enter the true inheritance land.

this day.

Ye Tian's eyes showed a look of joy, because his Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sect had finally been created.

Airplanes!

A special fluctuation appeared on his body, and this fluctuation seemed to turn into a pair of invisible hands that directly separated the calamity, allowing him to constantly shuttle through the calamity.

Even if he encounters an extremely terrifying calamity, he is sure to break through.

"This four-realm multi-dimensional mastery is mainly to use the Wind Tribulation, and you can even use the Wind Tribulation to attack, so it's called the Hand of the Wind Tribulation!"

What's really terrifying about the Hand of the Wind Tribulation is that in places where there is no Wind Tribulation, it can also condense wisps of Wind Tribulation to attack, and even travel the world with the Wind Tribulation.

After the creation of this four-realm multi-dimensional mastery, it also made his strength improve a little.

"Let's enter this inheritance land first!"

Ye Tian cast the hand of the wind and escaped into the land of inheritance.

......

"Come in!"

Ye Tian stood in front of a stone statue of inheritance in the Land of Inheritance, this stone statue was the master of this place of inheritance, the Lord of the Heavenly Dimension Realm!

The Lord of the Heavenly Dimension Realm claimed to be invincible in the fifth realm, but unfortunately in the end, he still did not break through to the sixth realm, and fell and died.

Ye Tian touched the stone statue and sensed the existence of a sect inheritance.

There is no test here, as long as you can enter here, you can obtain the inheritance of the ten-dimensional celestial body.

Rumble!!!!!

Countless messages poured into his mind, allowing him to obtain the inheritance of the ten-dimensional celestial body.

But soon, he was surprised.

Although he couldn't see the inheritance content after the second layer of the ten-dimensional celestial body, he knew that he had obtained the complete inheritance of the ten-dimensional celestial body, an innate multi-dimensional Dao body, and a total of five layers of inheritance content had been obtained by him.

"Could it be that the Extinction Realm Lord is fooling me, and what he has obtained is not the third-layer content, but all the fifth-layer inheritance?"

"It shouldn't be fooling me, there's no need for that!"

And he really passed the test of the Tribulation perfectly, so that he could obtain all the five layers of inheritance.

"It's time to get out!"

Ye Tian went out from here.

After returning to the 4,500 Territory, Ye Tian had comprehended the first layer of the ten-dimensional celestial body.

According to the introduction of the ten-dimensional celestial body, once you cultivate to the first layer, you can escape into the second dimension, and the strength of the ten-dimensional celestial body is that it can transfer attack damage.

For example, if an enemy's attack falls on him, he can also transfer one-tenth of the damage to the second dimension.

Transferring one-tenth of the damage is nothing, but the moment of truth is the difference between victory and defeat.

And this is only the first layer of the ten-dimensional celestial body, what if you cultivate to the second and third layers?

Ask for flowers

He thought of the Extinction Realm Lord, and the strength of the other party was probably not simple.

However, he has now also obtained the ten-dimensional celestial body inheritance, and he can also cultivate ten-dimensional celestial bodies.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian spent a lot of years finally understanding the first layer of the ten-dimensional celestial body, but if he wanted to cultivate the ten-dimensional celestial body, he still needed one more item, that is, an item from the tenth dimension, and he could only cultivate into a ten-dimensional celestial body by absorbing a trace of the power of the tenth dimension.

If he was in the 500th Realm, he would not have been able to obtain such a treasure, but here, there were quite a few items from the 10th dimension.

For example, the Ten-Dimensional Treasure Tree is from the Tenth Dimension, and there are some other treasures and so on.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian went to inquire about this kind of treasure, and finally found out, and spent a lot of multi-dimensional treasure coins to buy a treasure from the tenth dimension-ten-dimensional gravel.

This is a treasure from the tenth dimension, and in a special area, it is often accompanied by the storm of the tenth dimension to enter the territory of the four thousand.

This is also the cheapest tenth dimensional treasure, containing a trace of tenth dimensional power.

Ye Tian had purchased a lot of ten-dimensional gravel, which should be enough for his own cultivation.

Subsequently.

He began to retreat and refine the ten-dimensional sand and gravel to cultivate the ten-dimensional celestial body.

Airplanes!!!!

One by one, the ten-dimensional gravel was suspended around his body, and wisps of tenth-dimensional power turned into a trace of silver light and submerged into his body, refining his body according to the power of ten-dimensional celestial bodies.

The whole process was perfect, and there were no mistakes.

Ye Tian continued to deduce and analyze, and it was almost 100% probable, and there would be no mistakes.

Finally, after a long time.

Rumble!!!!

The ten-dimensional celestial body was cultivated, and Ye Tian's body began to transform and become more tenacious.

The wisdom body of the Kasya, the body of the black mother, the ten-dimensional celestial body.

The three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies intersected with each other, as if they were about to repuls, but they were forcibly suppressed with the help of the Three Wu Secret Methods of the second layer of Dacheng Limit, and finally formed a perfect closure.

"It's done, in a short period of time, the three-black secret method of the second layer of Dacheng limit can still suppress the three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, but with the continuous improvement of these three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, I am afraid that the three-black secret method of the third layer is needed!"

Ye Tian muttered.
